sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10275" key="a)ntiparalla/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαραλλάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n10275.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass from side to side,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χεῖρας περὶ τὸ στέρνον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.103</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
